parameters.query:
SELECT
  m.id AS match_id,
  COALESCE($2, m.ticker_mode) AS ticker_mode,
  CASE WHEN (ht.name ILIKE '%Frankfurt%' OR at.name ILIKE '%Frankfurt%')
       THEN 'ef_whitelabel' ELSE 'generic' END AS instance,
  CASE WHEN (ht.name ILIKE '%Frankfurt%' OR at.name ILIKE '%Frankfurt%')
       THEN 'euphorisch' ELSE 'neutral' END AS style,
  CASE WHEN ht.name ILIKE '%Frankfurt%' THEN ht.name
       WHEN at.name ILIKE '%Frankfurt%' THEN at.name
       ELSE NULL END AS fan_team
FROM matches m
JOIN teams ht ON ht.id = m.home_team_id
JOIN teams at ON at.id = m.away_team_id
WHERE m.external_id = $1
LIMIT 1

UPDATE matches SET
  home_score = $2,
  away_score = $3
WHERE id = $1
RETURNING id, home_score, away_score

  "instance": "{{ $('DB: Match-Instanz7').first().json.instance }}",
  "status": "{{ $('DB: Match-Instanz7').first().json.ticker_mode === 'auto' ? 'published' : 'draft' }}"
}

parameters.query:
SELECT m.match_phase, m.external_id,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ticker_entries
   WHERE match_id = m.id AND phase = 'PenaltyShootout' AND source = 'manual') AS has_penalty_ticker
FROM matches WHERE id = $1
UPDATE matches SET penalty_home_score = $1, penalty_away_score = $2 WHERE id = $3
